text.title: Azure Architecture (Well-Architected + Landing Zones) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: tenant-model
step.action: Decide single-tenant vs multi-tenant. Plan subscriptions per environment + per business unit.

step.name: mg-hierarchy
step.action: Author 3-level MG hierarchy (root → platform/landingzones → workload categories).

step.name: policy-initiative
step.action: Compose policy initiative; assign at platform-MG level.

step.name: identity
step.action: Set Managed Identity for every service. Convert privileged roles to PIM-eligible. Disable long-lived service principals.

step.name: network
step.action: Deploy hub-spoke (or VWAN); enable Private DNS + Private Endpoints for PaaS.

step.name: bcdr
step.action: Provision immutable Azure Backup vault. Site Recovery if RTO < 1h. Document tested restore.
